notes: TRUNCATED FIXTURE — expected_complete=false. Original ground-truth was 20 events curated from the full ~480KB-preprocessed MEC monthly grid. Preflight (Phase 5.1) revealed that only the FIRST 12 of those events fall within the extractor's 40K-char prompt window — the remaining 8 are outside the truncation cliff. We trimmed the GT to the 12 in-window events so this fixture measures EXTRACTION SKILL (does the model find what's visible?) rather than TRUNCATION (which we already know costs recall). The 8 removed events are documented in scripts/llm_extractor_preflight.ts output and the Phase 5.1 session notes — they include 'Mahjong @ the Library', 'Grow Your Own Medicinal Herb Garden', 'Kurt Gallagher Kids\' Concert', 'Music on McFarland presents Fire & Thyme', 'NAMI: Ending the Silence', 'Friends of the Library Summer Book Sale', 'OrangeREADS Author Talk with Alexis Coe', and 'Author Talk with Yardena Schwartz'. RECALL is computed against these 12 in-window events. PRECISION is NOT computed for this fixture (still expected_complete=false): the extractor may also find real in-window events outside our curated 12, and we can't distinguish those from hallucinations without expanding GT. Per-fixture precision is reported as informational only and excluded from the aggregate. Structural notes: em-* classes (Modern Events Calendar plugin); monthly grid (em-cal-event with data-event-url/data-event-id) plus per-event modal popups (div.em-modal-title > a.href). Each modal's body includes 'em-item-meta-line em-event-date' (e.g. 'April 27, 2026') and 'em-event-time' (e.g. '11:00 am – 11:45 am'). Many events recur. Title evidence from modal title anchor; date evidence from em-event-date line in the same modal block. Times are America/New_York → EDT (UTC-04:00) for late April through early June 2026.
